text: My laptop won't connect to the VPN. I keep getting error code 619. This started after the Windows update last night.
I need access to the Salesforce sandbox environment for UAT testing. My manager Sarah has approved this.
Excel keeps crashing whenever I open files larger than 10MB. Running Office 365 on Windows 11. Started after I added a new add-in.
My monitor keeps flickering when connected to the docking station. Can someone replace the dock?
notes: Ambiguous — could be hardware (dock) or network (docking station driver). 'hardware' is the primary expected category but 'other' is partially acceptable.

text: URGENT: Our entire sales team cannot access the CRM system. This is blocking all customer calls today. 15 people affected.
notes: Priority should be critical due to business impact (15 users, revenue-blocking). Assigning to L1 would be a significant error.

text: I forgot my password and the self-service reset isn't working. I have a client presentation in 30 minutes.
The shared printer on the 3rd floor has been jamming every few pages for the past week. Multiple people have reported this.
I think my laptop might have a virus. I'm getting strange pop-ups and my browser keeps redirecting to weird sites.
notes: Ambiguous — could be 'software' or 'other'. The key signal is assigning to 'security' team, not L1. A wrong team assignment here is a security risk.

text: Can you install Tableau Desktop on my machine? I have a license key from my manager.
Our SSO login page keeps timing out but only when using Chrome. Works fine in Edge. Started this morning.
notes: Genuinely ambiguous — could be 'access' (SSO/auth issue) or 'software' (browser issue). Either category is defensible. The evaluator should handle this gracefully.
